title: CK-12 Biology FlexBooks
description: A link-only discovery card for CK-12 biology textbooks and study resources.
license: CK-12 Curriculum Materials License · link-only catalog use

usagePolicy.reason: CK-12 currently restricts content aggregation and AI/ML use without permission.

pages.text: CK-12 offers customizable biology FlexBooks covering cells, genetics, evolution, ecology, microorganisms, plants, animals, and human biology.
Open CK-12 FlexBooks and search for Biology. Use the official CK-12 reader and assignment tools for the curriculum content.
Link only: CK-12 curriculum text is not mirrored or sent to AlloFlow AI features. Open the official CK-12 site to read, customize, or assign the material.
